subject: style(hero): remove SVG fade animation and set tagline to sky blue
body:
Remove pulse animation from the glasses icon and text-glow animation
from the tagline. Tagline now renders in static sky-400 (#38bdf8).
Cleaned up unused animation definitions and keyframes from index.css.
